history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: A person is seated outdoors in front of a green storefront area with shutter doors and visible items hanging and stacked behind them.

Main Subject:
A young person with short, dark, slightly tousled hair sits facing the camera and smiles, making a hand gesture with both hands in the foreground.

Setting:
The scene appears to be outside or in an open-sided area at ground level, under a metal roof. Behind the person are a large gray roll-up shutter door on the left and an open green wall area in the middle with shelves and hanging items. The lighting suggests daytime, with bright light coming from the left side of the image.

Visual Details:
The person wears a black short-sleeve T-shirt with white text reading “PIXMA” across the chest. They are seated on the ground or a low surface, leaning slightly forward. Their right hand is extended toward the camera with fingers forming a gesture, while the left hand is closer to their body, also with fingers spread. The background includes a green wall and shelving with various items placed on top, including bags or cloths and other indistinct objects. A plastic bag with packaged items hangs from the right side of the background. The composition is a close-to-medium framing, shot from slightly below or at about seated face level, with the person occupying the lower center of the frame and the storefront elements filling the upper background.

Visible Text:
PIXMA

Practical Summary:
The image shows a person wearing a black “PIXMA” T-shirt seated and smiling while making a finger gesture toward the camera. Behind them is a green storefront space with a gray roll-up shutter and stacked or hanging items.
- Hasil Ekstraksi Teks Gambar (OCR):
# Extracted Text

- **PIXMA**

# Structured Version

## Visible Text (Clothing/Logo)
- **PIXMA**

# Notes

- No other readable text is clearly visible in the screenshot.

Pertanyaan asli user: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail.

Tentu, mari kita deskripsikan gambar ini secara detail untuk generator teks-ke-gambar AI.

Gambar ini menampilkan seorang pria muda Asia yang sedang duduk di luar ruangan pada malam hari, dengan latar belakang bangunan yang dicat hijau cerah. Pria itu mengenakan kaos hitam polos dengan tulisan "PIXMA" di dada kiri. Dia memiliki rambut hitam pendek yang sedikit berantakan dan tersenyum ke arah kamera. Tangan kanannya terangkat dengan posisi jari yang khas, seperti sedang memberi isyarat.

Latar belakangnya adalah dinding bangunan yang dicat hijau terang, dengan beberapa rak yang terpasang di dinding. Di rak-rak tersebut terlihat beberapa barang seperti tas atau kain, serta beberapa tulisan di dinding, salah satunya terlihat seperti poster atau pengumuman dengan tulisan "MAGNUM". Di sebelah kanan, tergantung kantong plastik besar berisi barang-barang, kemungkinan makanan ringan atau kebutuhan lainnya. Di dekatnya, ada sapu yang bersandar di dinding. Bangunan tersebut memiliki atap yang terbuat dari seng atau bahan serupa, dengan penyangga kayu. Di sebelah kiri, terlihat pintu garasi gulung berwarna abu-abu yang tertutup.

Pencahayaan dalam gambar ini berasal dari sumber cahaya buatan yang cukup terang, menyoroti subjek utama dan sebagian latar belakang. Cahaya ini menciptakan kontras yang cukup jelas antara area yang terang dan area yang gelap, memberikan kesan malam hari. Palet warna didominasi oleh hijau cerah dari dinding, hitam dari kaos subjek, dan warna-warna netral dari latar belakang seperti abu-abu dan coklat.

Suasana dalam gambar ini terasa santai dan kasual. Senyum subjek dan gestur tangannya memberikan kesan ramah dan mudah didekati. Latar belakang yang agak sederhana namun penuh detail ini menambah karakter pada foto.

Jadi, prompt yang bisa digunakan untuk AI text-to-image generator adalah:

"A young Asian man with short, messy black hair is sitting outdoors at night, smiling at the camera. He is wearing a black t-shirt with the word 'PIXMA' printed on the left chest. His right hand is raised, making a hand gesture. The background is a brightly painted green wall with shelves holding various items, including what appears to be a poster or announcement with the word 'MAGNUM' on it. To the right, a large plastic bag filled with items hangs on the wall, and a broom leans nearby. A corrugated metal roof with wooden supports is visible above. To the left, a closed gray roll-up garage door is present. The lighting is artificial and somewhat bright, creating distinct highlights and shadows, suggesting a nighttime setting. The overall mood is relaxed and casual. Photorealistic style, medium shot."
